faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Melrose typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Melrose apartments?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications approved for use in residential buildings. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs and eggs instantly, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide lasting protection. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Melrose apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Melrose apartments take 4-8 hours depending on unit size and infestation level. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination of any newly hatched bed bugs.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Melrose apartment during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to therapeutic levels. With chemical treatments, you should plan to stay away for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions and can work around your schedule to minimize disruption.
